subject: fix(ui): remove left gap on mobile tab content
body:
The dashboard-layout flex container has a 24px gap between
its children. On mobile, the filter sidebar becomes a fixed
overlay (position: fixed), but its wrapper div remains in the
flex flow, causing the gap to push content 24px from the left.

Reset gap to 0 on mobile since the sidebar is no longer a
flex sibling but a fixed overlay.

Tags: ui, mobile, css
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
